description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. Use a single ubuntu-22.04 job with a matrix strategy for Python 3.10 on ubuntu-22.04. The job should check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies, build and install libemu, install Tox and appdirs, configure Thug, test Thug with Tox, and upload the coverage report to Codecov using the CODECOV_TOKEN from secrets.
